title: Mpox: adherence and barriers to isolation
body: "This rapid review identified and summarised the evidence relating to adherence and barriers to following isolation guidance for mpox  The rapid review searched for research published up to 15 August 2022 and includes 3 studies reporting on 2 online surveys.  Only studies including the clade II of mpox were considered, as this is the clade circulating in the 2022 global outbreak, including in the UK.   This was rapid review was originally published 2 March 2023 on a page that has since been withdrawn.  "
